posts.text:
.@RepAndyBiggsAZ just introduced a bill that would abolish OSHA and workplace safety regulations that protect workers, including first responders, from preventable workplace dangers. But sure, Andrew, go off on how much you care about protecting life, you fucking hypocrite


Rep Andy Biggs (@RepAndyBiggsAZ)

Life is precious and fragile. What happened at Reagan National tonight is tragic.

Please join me in praying for the victims and their loved ones. 

Thank you to all of the first responders
